# Substrate cleanup: legacy folders + 195-PR collision + active-tier residue + syncer fixes

## Context

Graduating sub-ticket from [Discussion #11359](https://github.com/orgs/neomjs/discussions/11359) — *"Epic #11187 Phase 6 Activation — Substrate Cleanup to Target Architecture"* — under Epic [#11187](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/issues/11187) **Phase 6 (AC16/AC17 post-merge verification)**.

§6 Consensus Mandate satisfied with 3× explicit `[GRADUATION_APPROVED]` signals (see Signal Ledger below). Body rev4 cleared @neo-gpt's prior DEFERRED via collision-aware data plan + active-tier residue + `PullRequestSyncer` `pr-` prefix fix.

## The Problem

Empirical state on `origin/dev` (`git ls-tree`-verified at commit `8a1906221`):

| Surface | Tracked files | Issue |
|---|---:|---|
| `archive/pulls/v13.0.0/` | 195 | pre-staged "next-release archive" while v13 unreleased (mis-bucketing by `migrate-pr-archive-ac8.mjs --fallback-version v13.0.0` in PR #11291) |
| `issue-archive/` (legacy) | 3,153 | should be empty post-Epic-#11187 |
| `pr-archive/` (legacy) | 17 + README | should be empty post-Epic-#11187 |
| `issues/issue-*.md` (flat) | 25 (issue-11065 through 11122) | violates target chunked shape `issues/<NNN>xx/issue-N.md` |
| `pulls/111xx/pr-*.md` (wrong dir) | 6 (pr-11137/11143/11146/11149/11151/11153) | should be at `pulls/pr-111xx/`; symptom of `#getPullRequestPath` bug |
| `.sync-metadata.json` | encodes 195 v13 PRs with stale paths | metadata reset MUST be atomic with file cleanup |

**195-PR collision breakdown** (V-B-A'd by @neo-gpt against `origin/dev`):
- 187 byte-identical duplicates of active copies → delete v13 copies
- 4 stale-active collisions (#11123/11125/11127/11137) → active has stale `OPEN`-state; v13 has newer `MERGED` content → use v13 content, replace active
- 4 missing-active (#11129/11130/11139/11142) → no active counterpart → move v13 copy → active

## The Architectural Reality

**The producer-side bug (3 syncers + 1 PR-active-path bug):**

| Surface | Bug |
|---|---|
| `ai/services/github-workflow/sync/IssueSyncer.mjs` line 333 | `defaultArchiveVersion` → `'unversioned'` fallback pre-stages closed-post-latest-release issues into archive (wrong-shape; should stay in active) |
| `ai/services/github-workflow/sync/PullRequestSyncer.mjs` line 135 | Same `'unversioned'` fallback pattern |
| `ai/services/github-workflow/sync/PullRequestSyncer.mjs` `#getPullRequestPath()` | Uses `chunkPath(pr.number)` directly → produces `pulls/111xx/pr-NNNNN.md`; needs `pr-` prefix concat to produce target `pulls/pr-111xx/pr-NNNNN.md` |
| `ai/services/github-workflow/sync/DiscussionSyncer.mjs` line 111 | Hardcoded `'legacy'` fallback (drift from issues/pulls) |
| `ai/scripts/migrate-pr-archive-ac8.mjs` | One-shot migration script with `--fallback-version v13.0.0` CLI default; harmful flag enabled the mis-bucketing |

**Mental model** (operator-canonical, locked-in per Discussion #11359 §1):

> Two buckets: **Active** `resources/content/{issues,pulls,discussions}/` = OPEN backlog AND items closed-for-next-release. **Archive** `resources/content/archive/{type}/v*.*.*/` = items shipped in PAST releases only. Archive folders for `vN.M.K` are created **at release-cut by `publish.mjs`**, never earlier.

## The Fix (single atomic PR)

### Code changes

1. **3-syncer fallback fix** — `#planArchiveBuckets` in `IssueSyncer`, `PullRequestSyncer`, `DiscussionSyncer`: return `null`/skip bucketing for closed-post-latest-release items; `#getIssuePath` / `#getPullRequestPath` / `#getDiscussionPath` return active path for those items. Remove `'unversioned'` and `'legacy'` fallback emission entirely.
2. **`PullRequestSyncer#getPullRequestPath()` active-write-path bug** — concat `pullFilenamePrefix` (default `'pr-'`) with `chunkPath(pr.number)` so active PRs target `pulls/pr-<NNN>xx/`, not `pulls/<NNN>xx/`. Verify `IssueSyncer`/`DiscussionSyncer` analogous paths don't have the same prefix-omission bug.

### Data cleanup (collision-aware, atomic with metadata)

3. **195 v13 PR resolution** (NOT a blind move — per @neo-gpt V-B-A breakdown):
   - Delete 187 byte-identical duplicates from `archive/pulls/v13.0.0/`
   - Replace 4 stale-active copies with newer v13 content: `mv archive/pulls/v13.0.0/.../pr-N.md → pulls/pr-<NNN>xx/pr-N.md` overwriting (#11123/11125/11127/11137)
   - Move 4 missing-active copies to active: `mv archive/pulls/v13.0.0/.../pr-N.md → pulls/pr-<NNN>xx/pr-N.md` (#11129/11130/11139/11142)
   - Delete remaining `archive/pulls/v13.0.0/` tree
4. **Active-tier residue:**
   - Move 25 flat `issues/issue-*.md` → `issues/<NNN>xx/issue-N.md`
   - Move 6 wrong-dir `pulls/111xx/pr-*.md` → `pulls/pr-111xx/pr-*.md`
5. **Legacy folder deletion:**
   - Delete `resources/content/issue-archive/` (3,153 files)
   - Delete `resources/content/pr-archive/` (17 files + README)
6. **Atomic metadata reset** — `resources/content/.sync-metadata.json` deletion/reset in the SAME commit as file cleanup. Next sync regenerates from GitHub authoritative state.

### Substrate hygiene

7. **Delete `ai/scripts/migrate-pr-archive-ac8.mjs`** — one-shot script, job done; harmful `--fallback-version` flag was the bug enabler.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] **(AC1)** 3 syncers refactored: `#planArchiveBuckets` skips closed-post-latest-release items (no `'unversioned'`/`'legacy'` fallback emission); `#get*Path` returns active path for those items
- [ ] **(AC2)** `PullRequestSyncer#getPullRequestPath()` concats `pr-` prefix correctly for active PR target paths
- [ ] **(AC3)** `IssueSyncer` and `DiscussionSyncer` analogous paths verified to NOT have prefix-omission bug
- [ ] **(AC4)** Cleanup PR body includes **explicit generated move/delete manifest** showing 187 deletions + 4 stale-replaces + 4 missing-moves + 25 flat-issue-moves + 6 wrong-dir-pull-moves + 3,170 legacy-deletions (per @neo-gpt review-scope note: *"PR must prove the 187/4/4 collision handling mechanically, not narratively"*)
- [ ] **(AC5)** Manifest shows expected source-blob-hash and target-path for each move; deletions show source-blob-hash + reason (duplicate / archive-removal)
- [ ] **(AC6)** Dry-run script or test artifact demonstrates the manifest matches reality before commit
- [ ] **(AC7)** `.sync-metadata.json` reset/delete in same commit as file cleanup (atomic)
- [ ] **(AC8)** `ai/scripts/migrate-pr-archive-ac8.mjs` deleted in same PR
- [ ] **(AC9)** Post-merge verification: next gh-workflow MCP boot in Claude Code completes startup-sync without ENOENT cascade (resolves OQ5 boot-hang concern from Discussion)
- [ ] **(AC10)** Post-merge: `chore: ticket sync [skip ci]` commit rate drops to rare-real-content-delta-only (rather than 478-and-counting churn from half-migration sync writes)

## Out of Scope

- **Archive ingestion fix** (`IssueIngestor.mjs`, `DiscussionSource.mjs`, `PullRequestSource.mjs` archive-recursion + MD5 bypasses) — separate Phase 6 sub-issue per Discussion #11359 OQ7. Producer-vs-consumer lane split; sequenced after this cleanup. @neo-gemini-pro self-assigned.
- `archiveDir` legacy config key removal (`config.mjs` line 72) — separate config-audit ticket per Discussion OQ3 `[DEFERRED_WITH_TIMELINE]`
- `publish.mjs` PR-index + discussion-index regen parity gap — separate ticket per OQ6 `[DEFERRED_WITH_TIMELINE]` if downstream consumers exist
- Orchestrator daemon reactivation (separate v13 substrate; dormant since May 10)

## Avoided Traps

- **Trap: Blind "move 195 → active"** — rejected via @neo-gpt V-B-A; 195 contains 3 distinct cleanup actions (delete-dupe / replace-stale / move-missing), not one
- **Trap: Sequential file cleanup + metadata reset** — rejected; must be atomic to prevent startup sync from preserving bad placement knowledge between commits
- **Trap: Disable `syncOnStartup`/`pushToRepoAfterSync` as the fix** — rejected per @tobiu corrections; orchestrator doesn't do gh-workflow sync, dev-branch guards exist, those flags STAY on
- **Trap: Fail-closed write-guard PR before data cleanup** — rejected; the fail-OPEN concern was based on missing dev-branch-guard knowledge (operator clarified); architectural fix is the syncer fallback removal in this PR, not a separate write-guard
- **Trap: Treating active tree as already-correct** — rejected per @neo-gpt V-B-A; 25 flat issues + 6 wrong-dir pulls falsified that claim
- **Trap: Bundle archive-ingestion-fix in same PR** — rejected; producer-side cleanup must land first so consumers index correct shape; otherwise indexing-against-corrupted-state at intermediate commit
- **Trap: Defer migration-script deletion** — rejected per Discussion OQ2; one-shot script with proven-harmful CLI flag default should not remain rerunnable

- 2026-05-14T14:58:30Z @neo-opus-ada referenced in commit `4128b6c` - "chore(test): remove orphaned migratePrArchiveAc8.spec — script deleted in prior commit (#11360)

The migrate-pr-archive-ac8.mjs script was a one-shot migration tool whose job
completed when PR #11291 ran. Its --fallback-version v13.0.0 default became
the bug-enabler that #11360 fixes. The script was deleted in the prior commit;
this commit removes the corresponding orphaned unit test that imports the
deleted module.

Mechanical proof of the new migration (migrate-substrate-11360.mjs) is via
--dry-run manifest output (#11360 AC6), reproducible by reviewers without a
spec file. No replacement spec is filed because the new script is also
one-shot; once #11362 merges and the substrate is clean, the new script can
be deleted in a follow-up cleanup.

Refs #11360"
- 2026-05-14T15:05:48Z @neo-opus-ada referenced in commit `fae8dd6` - "test(github-workflow): supersede #11288 unversioned-target scenario in IssueSyncer spec (#11360)

#11360's syncer fix removes the `'unversioned'` archive fallback (architectural bug
fix per Epic #11187 Phase 6 mental model: closed-post-latest-release items stay in
active, not pre-staged into not-yet-existing version archives).

The pre-existing IssueSyncer.spec.mjs #11288 anomaly-hook test asserted that:
  1. A bucket-shift to `'unversioned'` fires an `[ARCHIVE ANOMALY]` warning
  2. The final path contains `'unversioned'`

Both assertions are now invalid by design — `'unversioned'` is no longer a valid
bucket. The #11288 anomaly-hook contract (warn on closedAt-shift across buckets)
is preserved for shifts between real release buckets (v11 → v12); only the
"shift to 'unversioned'" variant is removed.

Updated test asserts the new correct behavior: closed-post-latest-release items
land in active (`/issues/`, not `/archive/`, not `'unversioned'`).

The architectural-anomaly variant "previously-archived item now has no plan"
(i.e., archive → active shift suggesting metadata-vs-architecture drift) is a
worth-warning new failure mode but deliberately out-of-scope for #11360 — file
follow-up sub-ticket post-merge if substrate-rigor reasoning supports it.

Refs #11288 #11360 #11187"
- 2026-05-14T15:18:56Z @neo-opus-ada referenced in commit `85f1ab8` - "fix(github-workflow): address @neo-gpt PR #11362 Cycle 1 executable-surface blockers (#11360)

Four narrow fixes for blockers @neo-gpt surfaced in
https://github.com/neomjs/neo/pull/11362#issuecomment-4451929148 (correction at
https://github.com/neomjs/neo/pull/11362#pullrequestreview-4291032804):

1. IssueSyncer.spec.mjs:189 — assert active-tier placement via configured
   `issuesDir` rather than the literal substring `/issues/`. The earlier
   assertion silently broke because the spec rewires `issuesDir` to a tmp dir
   (e.g., `tmp/issue-syncer-test-XXX-YYY/`), which contains no `/issues/`
   substring even when behavior is correct.

2. package.json — drop the stale `ai:migrate-pr-archive-ac8` script entry that
   pointed at the one-shot migration script deleted in commit `7163ea128`.

3. resources/content/pulls/pr-111xx/pr-11127.md — strip trailing whitespace on
   3 blockquote-separator lines (markdown blockquote-paragraph format that
   `git diff --check` flags) and the trailing blank line at EOF.

4. ai/scripts/migrate-substrate-11360.mjs — pipe-safe stdout emit so the
   ~737 KiB dry-run manifest reaches downstream parsers reliably. Replaces
   `console.log(...); process.exit(0)` with
   `process.stdout.write(..., () => process.exit(0))` so the kernel buffer
   drains before exit (default 64 KiB pipe buffer truncated trailing ops
   under `... | head` / `... | jq`).

Locally: `IssueSyncer.spec.mjs` 4/4 pass; `PullRequestSyncer.spec.mjs` 1/1 pass;
`node ai/scripts/migrate-substrate-11360.mjs --dry-run | wc -c` = 737347;
`node ... --dry-run | python3 -c 'import json,sys; json.load(sys.stdin)'`
parses cleanly with `operations.length === 3399` matching the PR body.

Broader Epic #11187 substrate rot (config `defaultArchiveVersion: 'unversioned'`,
`archiveDir: 'resources/content/issue-archive'` post-migration dead ref,
MetadataManager `archiveVersion` propagation, PullRequestSyncer pre-stage
branch) is delegated outside this PR per operator directive — see A2A
`MESSAGE:220c166d-cc96-408d-916f-c26e28d49b09`.

Co-Authored-By: @neo-gpt"
- 2026-05-14T15:20:37Z @neo-gpt cross-referenced by #11363
- 2026-05-14T15:29:25Z @neo-gpt cross-referenced by #11364
- 2026-05-14T15:40:52Z @tobiu referenced in commit `559c73d` - "fix(github-workflow): substrate cleanup — legacy archives + 195-PR collision + syncer fallback + pr- prefix (#11360) (#11362)

* fix(github-workflow): remove pre-stage-to-archive fallback in 3 syncers + pr- prefix on active PR paths (#11360)

Per Epic #11187 Phase 6 mental model (Discussion #11359 rev4): active
resources/content/{issues,pulls,discussions}/ holds backlog AND closed-for-next-release;
archive/{type}/vN.M.K/ holds past-release items only, created at release-cut by publish.mjs.

Three syncers (Issue, PR, Discussion) pre-staged closed-post-latest-release items into archive
via `defaultArchiveVersion || 'unversioned'` / `'legacy'` fallbacks. Per @neo-gpt V-B-A this was
the architectural bug behind the substrate corruption — closed-post-v12.1 items were being
bucketed into a not-yet-existing version archive (or the migration-script-hardcoded v13.0.0).

Changes:
- IssueSyncer/PullRequestSyncer/DiscussionSyncer #planArchiveBuckets: skip bucketing when no
  release-version applies (instead of fallback to 'unversioned'/'legacy').
- IssueSyncer/PullRequestSyncer #get*Path closed branch: when no plan, return active path
  (instead of re-deriving the wrong version + archive).
- DiscussionSyncer #getDiscussionPath: when no plan, return active flat path (was: null).
- PullRequestSyncer #getPullRequestPath: concat `pr-` prefix to chunkPath() for active PR chunk
  dirs (`pulls/pr-<NNN>xx/`). Previously produced wrong dir `pulls/<NNN>xx/`. This bug had 6
  empirical instances on dev (pr-11137/11143/11146/11149/11151/11153).

Adds ai/scripts/migrate-substrate-11360.mjs — one-shot manifest generator + applier for the
data-corpus cleanup. Sibling pattern of migrate-pr-archive-ac8.mjs (which this PR deletes in the
subsequent commit). Mechanical proof per AC4-AC6: --dry-run emits JSON manifest with full
collision breakdown (187/4/4 + 25 + 5 + 3,171 ops); --apply executes atomically.

Code-fix commit. Data-corpus cleanup follows in the next commit (#11360 AC7 atomicity).

Refs #11187 #11360 #11359

* chore(content): substrate cleanup — legacy archives + 195-PR collision + active-tier residue + metadata reset (#11360)

Atomic per AC7: file cleanup + .sync-metadata.json reset in same commit so startup sync
cannot preserve bad placement knowledge between commits.

Generated via `node ai/scripts/migrate-substrate-11360.mjs --apply` (committed in prior commit).
Mechanical manifest summary (per #11360 AC4-AC6 — see ticket for breakdown):

- 3,153 legacy issue-archive/ deletions
- 18 legacy pr-archive/ deletions (17 PR markdown + README)
- 187 v13 duplicate deletions (byte-identical to active)
- 4 stale-active replaces (#11123, #11125, #11127, #11137 — v13 newer-merged content wins)
- 4 missing-active moves (#11129, #11130, #11139, #11142 — v13 → active)
- archive/pulls/v13.0.0/ subtree deletion
- 25 flat issues moved to chunked: issues/issue-N.md → issues/<NNN>xx/issue-N.md
- 5 wrong-dir pulls moved: pulls/111xx/pr-N.md → pulls/pr-111xx/pr-N.md (excluded #11137 which
  is also a stale-active replace; the replace op handles its redirect to correct target path)
- .sync-metadata.json deleted (force regen on next sync from GitHub authoritative state)
- ai/scripts/migrate-pr-archive-ac8.mjs deleted (one-shot, harmful --fallback-version v13.0.0
  default was the bug enabler per Discussion #11359)

- @neo-gpt: [GRADUATION_APPROVED] rev4 (after DEFERRED at rev3; V-B-A surfaced this exact
  collision-aware 187/4/4 breakdown which is now mechanically proven by the manifest)
